trending_videos.title: Alien: Isolation - Official Sequel Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
A feeling of being safer than one really is...
Take a look at the teaser for the long-awaited sequel to Alien: Isolation, the survival horror game developed by Creative Assembly.

#ign #gaming

trending_videos.title: San Antonio Spurs at Portland Trail Blazers
trending_videos.description: The Spurs face the Trail Blazers in Game 4 at the Moda Center tonight. San Antonio leads the series following a 120-108 Game 3 win, powered by Stephon Castle's playoff-high 33 points. Portland started strong, but the Spurs took over the lead late.

trending_videos.title: Sunday Night in America With Trey Gowdy
trending_videos.description: Insightful analysis and a new outlook on the issues facing the country; Trey Gowdy, the former South Carolina Congressman, breaks down the legal and political news.

trending_videos.title: Colorado Avalanche at Los Angeles Kings
trending_videos.description: The Avalanche face the Kings at Crypto.com Arena for Game 4. Colorado leads 3-0 after a 4-2 Game 3 win. Cale Makar scored the tiebreaker, and Brock Nelson sealed the victory with an empty-net goal. Moore and Kempe provided the scoring for the Kings.

trending_videos.title: The White House Correspondents' Dinner
trending_videos.description: John Berman and Laura Coates anchor CNN's live coverage of the 2026 White House Correspondents' Dinner.

trending_videos.title: Zurich Classic of New Orleans, Final Round
trending_videos.description: From TPC Louisiana in Avondale, La.

trending_videos.title: Tell All: Part 1
trending_videos.description: On part one of the Tell All, the couples share the latest updates on their relationships; jam-packed with secrets and shocking reveals, plus a new confessional cam capturing unfiltered opinions, the night leaves tensions at an all-time high.

trending_videos.title: Ben vs. Bats
trending_videos.description: After countless setbacks, an engaged couple's finally saved enough to renovate their first home together; the house needs more work than expected, and with bats in the attic and a tight budget, they call on Ben and Erin for help.

trending_videos.title: 4-Wide Nationals
trending_videos.description: From zMAX Dragway in Concord, N.C.

trending_videos.title: Los Angeles Angels at Kansas City Royals
trending_videos.description: The Angels and Royals close out their three-game series in Kansas City. Los Angeles right-hander José Soriano brings a 5-0 record and a 0.28 ERA into the matchup. The Royals look to Bobby Witt Jr. for a home-field advantage to end the weekend.

sports_content.insight: Sports content is a leading trend, accounting for 40% of total views. Expanding coverage on lesser-known sports events or niche sports could capture additional audience interest.

entertainment_trailers.insight: With the successful viewership of the 'Alien: Isolation' trailer, there is potential for significant engagement in gaming and movie trailers, suggesting a focus on upcoming releases.

news_and_special_events.insight: Videos related to news and significant events such as political shows and dinners also capture a substantial share. Creating content around trending news or upcoming events could drive viewership.

collaborative_content.insight: Given the diversity of channels and topics, collaborations between channels with overlapping audiences (e.g., sports and news) could yield increased viewership and subscriber growth.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
